summary: Deliverable incomplete: missing Tests/LicenseChecker.Tests.ps1, fixtures/*.json, and act-result.txt (all referenced in workflow, required by task). Critical workflow bug: 'Run license checker' step (line 50) has continue-on-error: true, but 'Verify compliance' step (line 61) unconditionally reads report.json—crashes if check fails. No TDD evidence despite task requirement. PowerShell code itself is sound (Set-StrictMode, validation, error handling), but unshippable without fixes.
